mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_order WHERE is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_order WHERE status = #{status} AND is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT w.order_id AS orderId, w.product_id AS productId, w.line_id AS lineId, w.order_qty AS orderQty, w.priority, w.status, w.created_at AS createdAt, w.updated_at AS updatedAt, w.remarks AS remarks, p.product_name AS productName, p.unit, l.line_name AS lineName, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT cl.client_name SEPARATOR ', ') FROM work_order_client_order woco JOIN client_order co ON woco.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id JOIN client cl ON co.client_id = cl.client_id WHERE woco.work_order_id = w.order_id ) AS clientName, w.due_date AS dueDate, IFNULL(ps.stock_qty, 0) AS stockQty, w.order_qty AS requiredQty FROM work_order w LEFT JOIN product p ON w.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN production_line l ON w.line_id = l.line_id LEFT JOIN product_stock ps ON w.product_id = ps.product_id WHERE w.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT DISTINCT co.cl_order_id AS clOrderId, cod.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, p.unit AS unit, co.client_id AS clientId, cl.client_name AS clientName, co.cl_order_date AS clOrderDate, co.cl_delivery_date AS dueDate, cod.order_qty AS orderQty,
IFNULL(ps.available_qty, 0) AS availableQty,
GREATEST(cod.order_qty - IFNULL(ps.available_qty, 0), 0) AS requiredQty
FROM client_order co JOIN client_order_detail cod ON co.cl_order_id = cod.cl_order_id JOIN client cl ON co.client_id = cl.client_id JOIN product p ON cod.product_id = p.product_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, SUM(available_qty) AS available_qty FROM product_stock GROUP BY product_id ) ps ON cod.product_id = ps.product_id
co.cl_order_status = 'CONFIRMED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM work_order_client_order woco WHERE woco.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id AND woco.product_id = cod.product_id )
AND ( co.cl_order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR cl.client_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY co.cl_order_date DESC LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{perPageNum}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(co.cl_order_id, '-', cod.product_id)) FROM client_order co JOIN client_order_detail cod ON co.cl_order_id = cod.cl_order_id JOIN client cl ON co.client_id = cl.client_id JOIN product p ON cod.product_id = p.product_id WHERE co.cl_order_status = 'CONFIRMED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM work_order_client_order woco WHERE woco.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id AND woco.product_id = cod.product_id )
AND ( co.cl_order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR cl.client_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT cod.cl_order_id AS clOrderId, cod.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, co.client_id AS clientId, c.client_name AS clientName, co.cl_delivery_date AS dueDate, cod.order_qty AS orderQty, IFNULL(ps.stock_qty, 0) AS stockQty, IFNULL(sr.reserved_qty, 0) AS reservedQty, (IFNULL(ps.stock_qty, 0) - IFNULL(sr.reserved_qty, 0)) AS availableQty, GREATEST(cod.order_qty - (IFNULL(ps.stock_qty, 0) - IFNULL(sr.reserved_qty, 0)), 0) AS requiredQty FROM client_order co JOIN client_order_detail cod ON co.cl_order_id = cod.cl_order_id JOIN client c ON co.client_id = c.client_id JOIN product p ON cod.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_stock ps ON cod.product_id = ps.product_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cl_order_id, product_id, SUM(reserved_qty) AS reserved_qty FROM stock_reservation GROUP BY cl_order_id, product_id ) sr ON cod.cl_order_id = sr.cl_order_id AND cod.product_id = sr.product_id
WHERE cod.cl_order_id = #{clOrderId} AND cod.product_id = #{productId}
SELECT bom_id FROM bom_master WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY bom_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT material_id AS materialId, material_name AS materialName, unit, material_type AS materialType, qty, qty * #{orderQty} AS totalQty FROM bom_detail WHERE bom_id = #{bomId}
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(order_id, 3) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) FROM work_order WHERE order_id LIKE CONCAT('WO-', #{today}, '-%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_order ( order_id, product_id, line_id, order_qty, priority, status, remarks, due_date, order_manager, created_at ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{productId}, #{lineId}, #{orderQty}, #{priority}, IFNULL(#{status}, 'WAITING'), #{remarks}, #{dueDate}, #{orderManager}, NOW() )
INSERT INTO work_order_client_order ( work_order_id, cl_order_id, product_id, order_qty, created_at ) VALUES ( #{workOrderId}, #{clOrderId}, #{productId}, #{orderQty}, NOW() )
INSERT INTO work_order_material ( work_order_id, material_id, required_qty, created_at ) VALUES ( #{workOrderId}, #{materialId}, #{requiredQty}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT wco.cl_order_id AS clOrderId, wco.product_id AS productId, wco.order_qty AS orderQty, cl.client_name AS clientName, co.cl_delivery_date AS dueDate FROM work_order_client_order wco JOIN client_order co ON wco.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id JOIN client cl ON co.client_id = cl.client_id WHERE wco.work_order_id = #{workOrderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE work_order SET line_id = #{lineId}, order_qty = #{orderQty}, priority = #{priority}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE work_order SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE work_order SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT w.order_id AS orderId, w.product_id AS productId, w.order_qty AS orderQty, w.priority, w.status, w.created_at AS createdAt, p.product_name AS productName, w.due_date AS dueDate FROM work_order w JOIN product p ON w.product_id = p.product_id WHERE w.line_id = #{lineId} AND w.status IN ('WAITING', 'READY', 'IN_PROGRESS') AND w.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY CASE w.priority WHEN 'EMERGENCY' THEN 1 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2 WHEN 'NORMAL' THEN 3 WHEN 'LOW' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, w.due_date ASC

SELECT wo.order_id AS orderId, wo.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, pl.line_name AS lineName, wo.order_qty AS orderQty, wo.status, COALESCE(pr_sum.produced_qty, 0) AS producedQty FROM work_order wo LEFT JOIN product p ON wo.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN production_line pl ON wo.line_id = pl.line_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_id, SUM(actual_qty - COALESCE(defect_qty, 0)) AS produced_qty FROM production_result GROUP BY order_id ) pr_sum ON wo.order_id = pr_sum.order_id WHERE wo.status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'COMPLETED') AND wo.is_deleted = false ORDER BY wo.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE work_order w LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pr.order_id, COALESCE(SUM(pr.actual_qty - COALESCE(pr.defect_qty,0)), 0) AS good_sum FROM production_result pr WHERE pr.order_id = #{orderId} GROUP BY pr.order_id ) r ON r.order_id = w.order_id SET w.status = CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.good_sum, 0) >= w.order_qty THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN COALESCE(r.good_sum, 0) > 0 AND w.status IN ('WAITING','READY') THEN 'IN_PROGRESS' ELSE w.status END, w.updated_at = NOW() WHERE w.order_id = #{orderId}
